name: Lumax International Corp., Ltd.
summary: Lumax International Corp., Ltd. engages in the wholesale of electronic materials in Taiwan and China. It sells and installs process-control devices or systems, as well as provides maintenance services. The company also offers process automation consultancy during plant buildup, hardware/system installation, project management, and control valve maintenance for petrochemical, electronic, steel, and other non-tech enterprises; hardware product portfolio for calibration, inspection, and maintenance of control valves, switch valves, measurement instruments, analyzing instruments, and others; and control valve repair services, Lumax valves, and VOC anti-leakage solutions. In addition, it provides telecommunication materials and electronic components. Further, the company engages in international and transit trade, warehousing, and processing activities; producing insulating materials, power supplies, and computer connectors with thermostat and bearing high pressure; and processing thermal transfer materials, tape materials, LCD, etc., as well as provides installation and maintenance services for valves and calibration instruments. Additionally, it manufactures and designs computer systems and measuring appliance industry automation instruments; installs mechanical and electrical equipment; imports and exports goods and technology products; and provides assembly, repair, and instrument calibration of mechanical/electrical products. Lumax International Corp., Ltd. was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
